## Component: KPI CARD (CP-KPI-01)

One number that matters, with its label and week-over-week delta. Used in strips of 5 maximum.

### Geometry (px, follow literally)

```json
{
  "w": 200,
  "h": 92,
  "pad": 14,
  "label_size": 10,
  "label_dy": 24,
  "value_size": 32,
  "value_dy": 58,
  "delta_size": 11,
  "delta_dy": 78
}
```

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| card_bg | panel -> background |
| border | hairline |
| label | body |
| value | primary |
| delta_positive | positive |
| delta_negative | negative |
| delta_neutral | body |

### Rules
- value in tabular figures; delta always signed and always named against its reference
- tone (positive/negative/neutral) is semantic, set by the data, not by the sign
- maximum 5 cards per strip; more means the page has no message

### QA
- [ ] delta signed and referenced
- [ ] strip count <= 5 wherever used
